data.body: AC amendment: For the promotion notice and rejection error message strings in the before/after examples, read the actual output from ticket-graph.py (specifically resolve_hierarchy_link() return values and add_dependency() raised error messages in the implementation from 3f65-65ee and 983e-7fff). Add an acceptance criterion: Verify: python3 -c "import importlib.util; spec=importlib.util.spec_from_file_location('tg','plugins/dso/scripts/ticket-graph.py'); m=importlib.util.module_from_spec(spec); spec.loader.exec_module(m); assert hasattr(m,'resolve_hierarchy_link')" to confirm the implementation exists before documentation is finalized.
